items.title: ClearBridge Large Cap Growth Fund Q1 2025 Commentary
items.description: The S&P 500 Index declined 4.27% while the benchmark Russell 1000 Growth Index (RLG) fell 9.97%, trailing its value counterpart by over 1,200 basis points.

items.title: Sam Altman Admits ChatGPT New Upgrade Made It Too Sycophantic And Annoying: OpenAI CEO Says 'Working On Fixes ASAP'
items.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman admitted recent GPT-4o updates made the AI "too sycophant-y and annoying," promising fixes this week and hinting at future personality customization options.

items.title: Wall Street Brunch: Four More Mag 7 Plus Jobs And GDP
items.description: Four Magnificent 7 earnings reports will test the market. Bond market will focus on GDP and April Jobs numbers. Bessent says he does not know if Trump has spoken with Xi.
